Class AccountController

java.lang.Object
com.daraxtlar.quantummail.controller.AccountController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/account") @CrossOrigin(origins="http://localhost:5173") public class AccountController extends Object
REST controller responsible for user account management operations.

Provides endpoints for changing user passwords and deleting user accounts. All operations require an authenticated user.

  • Field Summary

    changePassword(PasswordChangeRequest request, Principal principal)
    Changes the password of the currently authenticated user.

  • Constructor Details

    • AccountController

      public AccountController(UserService userService)
      Creates a new account controller.
      Parameters:
      userService - service responsible for user account operations

  • Method Details

    • changePassword

      @PostMapping("/change-password") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<String> changePassword(@RequestBody PasswordChangeRequest request, Principal principal)
      Changes the password of the currently authenticated user.
      Parameters:
      request - password change request containing old and new passwords
      principal - authenticated user principal
      Returns:
      response indicating whether the password was successfully changed

    • deleteAccount

      @DeleteMapping("/delete") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<String> deleteAccount(@RequestBody DeleteAccountRequest request, Principal principal)
      Deletes the account of the currently authenticated user.
      Parameters:
      request - account deletion request containing the user's password
      principal - authenticated user principal
      Returns:
      response indicating whether the account was successfully deleted
